title: Vandenboschia schmidiana

The plant belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is classified as a vascular plant. Vandenboschia schmidiana is further classified as a member of the division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Hymenophyllales. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.

intro: Vandenboschia schmidiana, also known as the Schmid's cliff fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties.
